race.comment: FLYING BETTY (7) was good second-up when finishing fourth at over 1150m at Leeton. Among the top chances in what looks a most suitable race. Debutant EVERYONE'S MUMMA (2) has just been readied with the one quiet trial at Albury. Draws well for Martin and is worth some thought, even more so if the support is there. BRUTAL TO THE MAX (5) wasn't beaten too far in sixth over 1000m at Wagga three-and-a-half weeks ago. Has been knocking on the door and deserves her chance. TRISTANIA (12) is back after a break of ten weeks. At the last run before the layoff she finished fourth over 1400m at Berrigan. Commenced last prep with a minor placing at Berrigan over 1100m. Has trialled well leading into this. In the mix.
